name: Avocado Ham'n Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped eggs, ham, celery, green bell pepper, pimiento, and mustard with enough mayonnaise to moisten in a bowl. Mix lightly.
2. For each serving, place an avocado half on lettuce leaf.
3. Spoon the egg mixture into the center of the avocado.
4. Serve with breadsticks or crackers.
